title: Variable at duplicate
excerpt:
Looking for a better experience I expect that we can use some variable automation like: 

Every period time…
Then duplicate group…
with name current month/year


OR the last option 

with name same month/year from period
…

posts.author: Vraguzzoni (Vicente)
posts.cookedHtml:
Looking for a better experience I expect that we can use some variable automation like:

  • Every period time…
  • Then duplicate group…
  • with name current month/year

OR the last option

  • with name same month/year from period
